name: epis2-case-forge
description: Generador de pacientes sintéticos para EPIS2 — casos clínicos OA → demo L0

scripts.build: npm run build -w @case-forge/contracts && npm run build -w @case-forge/harvester
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @case-forge/contracts && npm run build -w @case-forge/harvester && npm run typecheck -w @case-forge/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @case-forge/harvester
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && node scripts/validate-scaffold.mjs
